root: ^Welcome back sis, I have great news!
^I got a meeting with the mayor and he finally agreed to let us expand, starting tomorrow we will have access to the other side of the city
^That's great! That should greatly increase our sales
^You should take a moment to yourself to rest after all of this, you've been working so hard recently
^I'd love to, but I have another meeting tonight
^Don't worry about that, I'll take care of it, so have the day off
^Really? That's nice of you, I'll let you handle it then
